paragraphs.text: 星期天，爸爸带我去爬山。山很高，山上有很多大树和野花。
paragraphs.translation: On Sunday, Dad took me hiking. The mountain was tall with many big trees and wildflowers.

paragraphs.text: 我们沿着山路往上走。走到一半我就累了，想坐下来休息。爸爸说：加油，快到山顶了！
paragraphs.translation: We walked up the mountain path. Halfway up I was tired and wanted to sit down. Dad said: Keep going, almost at the top!

paragraphs.text: 终于到了山顶。从山顶往下看，房子像火柴盒，汽车像小甲虫。山顶的风景真美！
paragraphs.translation: Finally we reached the top. Looking down from the summit, houses looked like matchboxes, cars like little beetles. The view from the top was beautiful!
